app.pageTitle: Octop - Born for Cloud, Knows You Better

apiErrors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
apiErrors.LOGIN_LOCKED: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
apiErrors.AGENT_NAME_TAKEN: This name is already in use. Please choose another.
apiErrors.PROVIDER_NAME_TAKEN: Provider name is already in use.
apiErrors.PROVIDER_REFERENCED: Provider is in use and cannot be removed.
apiErrors.STORAGE_BACKEND_NAME_TAKEN: Storage backend name is already in use.
apiErrors.STORAGE_BACKEND_REFERENCED: Storage backend is in use and cannot be removed.
apiErrors.CHANNEL_NAME_TAKEN: This channel name is already in use. Please choose another.
apiErrors.CONNECTOR_NOT_BOUND: Connector is not bound to this agent.
apiErrors.VOICE_BROWSER_ONLY: Voice input is only available in the browser.
apiErrors.TLS_NOT_ELIGIBLE: TLS issuance is not available in the current server configuration.
apiErrors.TLS_ISSUE_IN_PROGRESS: A certificate issuance task is already running.
apiErrors.TLS_DOMAIN_MISMATCH: The domain does not match the existing certificate.
apiErrors.WORKSPACE_OP_UNSUPPORTED: This workspace backend does not support that file operation.
apiErrors.SKILL_IMPORT_UNSUPPORTED_URL: This skill URL source is not supported.
apiErrors.SKILL_ALREADY_EXISTS: Skill {name} already exists. Enable overwrite to replace it.

model.title: Select and Configure LLM
model.desc: Choose an available LLM for your AI assistant. You can add more providers in the Models settings page.
model.noProvidersHint: Please go to Settings → Models to add and configure a model provider.
model.noActiveModels: No models enabled yet. Please configure a provider in the Models page first.

migrate.title: Migrate from OpenClaw
migrate.desc: An OpenClaw configuration was detected. You can migrate model config, channel config, workspace files, and skills to Octop in one click.
migrate.notFoundHint: No OpenClaw configuration file was found. If you haven't installed OpenClaw, you can skip this step.
migrate.foundHint: Select what you want to migrate, then click "Migrate Now":
migrate.channelMigrationWarning: After migration, the same channel will be connected to both OpenClaw and Octop agents simultaneously. Incoming messages may be answered by both agents, causing duplicate or conflicting replies. Only enable this option if OpenClaw is already stopped or you truly need dual-agent routing.
migrate.detectFailed: Detection failed, please skip this step

password.title: Set Login Password
password.desc: An initial password was randomly generated and saved to ~/octop-login.txt. Please enter it in the "Current Password" field below, then set your new password.
password.minLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
password.skipHint: You can also skip this step and change the password later in Settings → User Settings.
password.requiredHint: Please set a new password before finishing

scene.title: Choose Application Scene
scene.desc: Choose a preset scene to quickly configure the agent workspace, or skip this step to use the default configuration.
scene.applyConfirmContent: Applying the "{{name}}" scene will overwrite your current workspace configuration. Continue?
scene.skipHint: You can skip this step and choose a scene later in Agent → Personalization.

search.title: Configure AI Search
search.desc: Configure AI-powered web search providers to enable your assistant to search the internet. Each provider requires an API key from the respective service.
search.tip: You can configure search providers now or skip this step. Search can be enabled or updated later in Settings → Environments.

tavily.desc: AI-powered web search with intelligent answers

brave.desc: Privacy-focused search engine with independent index

google.desc: Google Custom Search with your own search engine

kimi.desc: Moonshot AI with built-in web search capability

search.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the authorization for {{name}}? The API key will be deleted and you'll need to reconfigure it to use this search provider.

channel.title: Configure Communication Channels
channel.desc: Configure communication channels (Dashboard, QQ, Feishu, YuanBao, WeCom, etc.) for your AI assistant. You can configure them now or later in Settings → Channels.
channel.optionalHint: This step is optional. You can skip it and configure channels later in Settings → Channels.

browser.title: Browser Environment
browser.desc: Octop uses browser automation to help you browse the web, fill out forms, take screenshots, extract information, and complete complex online tasks — all hands-free. A Chromium-based browser is required for these capabilities.
browser.notInstalledHint: No usable browser was found on this device. Click below to automatically download and set up a built-in Chromium browser, or skip this step and install one later.
browser.installSuccessHint: The browser environment is ready. Your assistant can now browse the web, take screenshots, and automate online tasks for you.
browser.installFailedHint: Automatic installation failed. You can try again or run the command below manually. If the download is slow or blocked, set the PLAYWRIGHT_DOWNLOAD_HOST environment variable to a mirror URL and retry.
browser.skipHint: You can skip this step. Web browsing, screenshots, and online automation features will not be available until a browser is installed.

experts.subtitle: Spin up a pre-configured agent (with identity / soul / heartbeat baked in) from a scenario template. Each expert ships with its own system prompt — once created, just bind a provider and start it.
experts.selectExpertHint: Pick an expert on the left to view details
experts.systemPromptHint: All expert files are concatenated in manifest order into the system prompt below (joined with \n\n).
experts.afterCreateHint: After creation, head to the Agents page to bind a provider and start the agent.
experts.emptyMyExpertsHint: Pick a template from the Expert List to create your first AI expert.
experts.emptyLibraryHint: Please ask your administrator to configure the expert list.
experts.noModelsWarning: No models configured. Please configure a Provider in the admin panel.
experts.backendRootDirDesc: Host filesystem root the backend may access, default `/`. Workspace file paths resolve relative to this directory; confirm permission scope before changing.
experts.temperatureTooltip: Sampling temperature — higher values produce more varied output

backendModes.localShellDesc: Read/write files and run shell commands with the broadest host access.
backendModes.localShellWarning: ⚠️ This mode can access the full host environment — use only in trusted scenarios.
backendModes.filesystemDesc: Read and write only inside the agent workspace directory; cannot run shell commands.
backendModes.state: Session state (no file or command access)
backendModes.stateDesc: In-process ephemeral storage only; no real file I/O or command execution. Data is lost on restart.
backendModes.compositeDesc: Route path prefixes to different backends to combine multiple storage modes.
backendModes.pathMappingHint: Paths must start with / (from root) and cannot be / alone.
backendModes.pathInvalidRoot: Path cannot be / alone — use a specific subpath (e.g. /data)

experts.mdFilesHint: These are the configuration files from the template. You can edit them in the workspace after creation.
experts.noWorkspaceFiles: No editable config files in workspace
experts.workspaceFilesFailed: Failed to load workspace config files
experts.skillFilesHint: Skills bundled with this expert. They will be written to the workspace skills/ directory after creation.
experts.noSkillFiles: This expert has no bundled skills
experts.subagentFilesHint: Subagents defined in the workspace agents/ directory. The main agent delegates tasks to them via the task tool.

subagents.agentNotReady: Start this agent before installing subagents

agent_errors.no_models_configured: No models are configured. Go to Settings → Models to add a Provider, then enable this expert again.
agent_errors.model_ref_unavailable: The default model is unavailable or disabled. Check Settings → Models or update this expert's default model, then try again.

chat.noSessionsYet: Send a message to start chatting
chat.agentNotRunningHint: Enable it on the Experts page before starting a chat.
chat.agentFailedHint: Check the error below, fix the configuration, then enable the expert again.
chat.agentStartingHint: Please wait until the expert is running.
chat.noAgentsHint: Pick a template from the Expert List to create your first AI expert.
chat.createSessionFailed: Failed to create a session — please try again

workspace.refreshHint: Refreshes root only; subfolders load on expand
workspace.pickFile: Select a file to view its contents
workspace.pickEntry: Select the workspace or a file to view
workspace.isDirectory: This is a folder — expand it in the tree
workspace.binaryHint: This file may be binary — use Download
workspace.jsonlHint: JSON Lines — one JSON record per line
workspace.archiveImportBody: Import “{{name}}” into the current agent workspace.
workspace.archiveModeMerge: Merge (overwrite same paths, keep other files)
workspace.deleteDirConfirm: Delete this folder and everything inside it?

backup.storedDesc: System backups are stored in the directory below. Download or restore with one click.
backup.exportDesc: Download a full system backup (database, config, local agent workspaces) as .tar.gz.
backup.importDesc: Restore from a previously exported .tar.gz archive. Prefer a maintenance window; restart the server after restore.
backup.importWarning: Restore overwrites the current database and local workspaces. This cannot be undone.
backup.importConfirmBody: Restore from “{{name}}”? Existing data will be overwritten.

skills.title: Skills
skills.customizedSkillsDesc: Skills you created and can edit
skills.invalidSkillUrlSource: Skill URL currently needs to start with https://skills.sh/, https://clawhub.ai/, https://skillsmp.com/, or https://github.com/
skills.contentPlaceholder:
---
name: <skill_name> (required)
description: <skill description> (required)
metadata: { "octop": { "emoji": "🔧" } }
---

Skill implementation content...

# Example:
# ---
# name: cron
# description: Manage cron jobs via octop commands - create, query, pause, resume, delete tasks
# metadata: { "octop": { "emoji": "⏰" } }
# ---
skills.deleteConfirmContent: Delete skill "{{slug}}"? This cannot be undone.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
skills.frontmatterRequired: Skills must start and end with ---
skills.editNotSupported: Edit operation is not supported by backend API
skills.editNote: Note: Backend API does not support editing skills. You can only view or toggle enable/disable status.
skills.installedSkillsDesc: Manage installed built-in and customized skills.
skills.tencentSkillHubDesc: Browse and install community skills from Tencent SkillHub.
skills.skillhubNotInstalled: skillhub CLI not installed. Please install first: curl -fsSL https://skillhub-1251783334.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com/install/install.sh | sh
skills.searchSkillHub: Search skill name, description or category...
skills.skillHubCommunityNote: All skills in this marketplace come from the SkillHub community
skills.rankingsEmpty: No skills in this ranking yet
skills.noAgentSelected: Pick an agent in the top switcher first
skills.noSkillsDesc: Create a custom skill — the agent will use it at the right moment.
skills.disableBeforeDelete: Disable the skill before deleting it
skills.bodyPlaceholder: Describe when to use this skill and how to execute it (Markdown)
skills.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe when this skill should be used
skills.newSkillBodyTemplate:
# My skill

Explain what this skill does and how to use it. The agent reads this markdown when picking skills for the current turn — write it clearly and actionably.
skills.newSkillTemplate:
---
name: my-skill
description: Describe briefly when this skill should be used
metadata:
  octop:
    emoji: ✨
---
# My skill

Explain what this skill does and how to use it. The agent reads this markdown when picking skills for the current turn — write it clearly and actionably.
skills.pickAgent: Choose an agent to install into

cronJobs.title: Cron Jobs
cronJobs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Cron Job?
cronJobs.name: Name
cronJobs.triggeredSuccess: Task triggered, result will appear shortly
cronJobs.noJobsDesc: Pick a suggestion below, or click "Create Task" to start from scratch
cronJobs.noJobsSuggestion1: Set up a daily auto task at 14:00 — provide today's action tips based on my zodiac sign "Gemini" and send them to me
cronJobs.noJobsSuggestion2: Remind me to drink water at 14:00 every day, starting today and running continuously — enable the task immediately after creation
cronJobs.noJobsSuggestion3: Push the latest 10 tech news stories every day with concise summaries for each item

form.sectionBasicDesc: Set the name and enable status. Once enabled, the job will run automatically on schedule.
form.idTooltip: A unique identifier for this job, auto-generated by the system.
form.name: Job Name
form.nameTooltip: A descriptive name to easily identify this job in the list.
form.enabledTooltip: When enabled, the job runs automatically on schedule. Disable to pause execution.
form.sectionScheduleDesc: Set when the job runs. Choose a preset frequency or enter a custom Cron expression.
form.scheduleModeTooltip: Preset: choose from common frequencies; Custom: enter a Cron expression for advanced scheduling.
form.presetTooltip: Select a commonly used execution frequency.
form.cronQuickPickTooltip: Fill a common cron expression, or edit the field below.
form.cronTooltip: Standard 5-field cron expression: minute hour day month weekday.
form.timezoneTooltip: Server-wide scheduler timezone from config.json (cron_timezone) or OCTOP_CRON_TIMEZONE. Shared by all cron jobs.
form.sectionTaskDesc: Define what to do when triggered.
form.taskTypeTooltip: Agent: let the AI agent process a request (recommended); Text: send a fixed text message.
form.textTooltip: The fixed text message that will be sent when the job triggers.
form.requestInputTooltip: The message sent to the agent, in JSON array format. This is the actual conversation message the agent receives.
form.agentPromptTooltip: Describe in natural language what you want the agent to do. For example: "Check today's weather" or "Summarize my latest emails".
form.agentPromptRequired: Please enter the instruction for the agent
form.agentPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Check today's weather and summarize my latest emails
form.agentPromptTooLong: Instruction must be at most {{max}} characters
form.agentPromptExtra: Just type what you want the agent to do — no special format needed.
form.modelTooltip: Specify the LLM model for this task. Leave empty to use the system's default active model.
form.freshThreadTooltip: When enabled, the session context is reset before each run (like starting a new chat).
form.sectionRoutingDesc: Pick the session where this job runs and delivers results. Leave empty for your Dashboard default session.
form.sessionKeyTooltip: Octop session_key — controls which channel/session receives cron output.
form.sessionKeyDefault: When empty, the server uses your Dashboard session for the current user.
form.sectionDispatchDesc: Where should the result be sent? Configure the channel and recipient.
form.dispatchChannelTooltip: Which channel to send results to.
form.noUsersFound: No users found in this channel
form.noSessionsFound: No sessions found in this channel
form.dispatchTargetUserIdTooltip: The user who receives the result. Use 'admin' for dashboard channel, or the platform-specific user ID for others.
form.dispatchTargetSessionIdTooltip: The session to send the message to. Usually 'default' works fine.
form.dispatchModeTooltip: stream: real-time streaming output; final: send the complete result once finished.
form.sectionAdvancedDesc: Usually no changes needed — default values work for most cases.
form.requestSessionIdTooltip: The session context used when the agent processes this job. Different session IDs maintain separate conversation histories.
form.requestUserIdTooltip: The identity used to initiate the request. Defaults to 'system'.
form.maxConcurrencyTooltip: Maximum number of simultaneous instances. Set to 1 to prevent overlapping runs.
form.timeoutSecondsTooltip: Maximum execution time in seconds. The job will be terminated if it exceeds this limit.
form.misfireGraceTooltip: If the job was missed (e.g. server was down), it will still run if within this grace period. Set to 0 to skip missed runs.

cronJobs.noAgentSelected: Pick an agent in the top-right switcher first to manage its scheduled tasks

channels.title: Channels
channels.intro_agentchat: Connect via the AgentChat protocol — no third-party setup required.
channels.octopbotGetCredentialsHint: Get your API credentials from OctopBot platform
channels.intro_qq: Set up QQ channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_feishu: Set up Feishu channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_dingtalk: Set up DingTalk channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_discord: Set up Discord channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_wecom: Set up WeCom channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_weixin: Set up WeChat channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_dashboard: Built-in local terminal channel, ready to use with zero configuration.
channels.intro_yuanbao: Set up Tencent YuanBao channel to chat with your bot
channels.intro_octopbot: Set up OctopBot platform channel to connect octop.cloud.tencent.com with your bot
channels.intro_xiaoyi: Set up Huawei XiaoYi (OpenClaw) channel via the A2A protocol
channels.intro_mqtt: Set up MQTT channel for IoT devices or robots to talk to your agent
channels.intro_telegram: Set up Telegram Bot channel via the Bot API
channels.dashboardAlwaysOn: Dashboard channel must remain enabled and cannot be turned off
channels.showToolDetailsDesc: When enabled, channel messages will display detailed tool call and result information
channels.showToolDetailsUpdateFailed: Failed to update tool details display setting
channels.showThinkingDesc: When enabled, the model's reasoning (chain-of-thought) is displayed in the dashboard chat and IM channel messages. Turning it off only hides the reasoning from users; the model still thinks internally.
channels.showThinkingUpdateFailed: Failed to update thinking display setting
channels.enableChannelDesc: When off, the channel stops receiving and sending messages but keeps its configuration
channels.showToolHintsDesc: When enabled, channel messages show tool-call activity and status hints
channels.reconnectConfirm: Would you like to attempt to reconnect this channel?
channels.checkRequestFailed: Connection check request failed, please try again later
channels.checkFailedAutoDisabled: Credential verification failed, channel has been auto-disabled
channels.enableFailedCheckFailed: Enable failed: connection check did not pass
channels.quickConfigStep1: Click the button below to go to WeCom Open Platform
channels.quickConfigStep2: Follow the instructions to authorize your bot
channels.quickConfigStep3: Once authorized, return here and the channel will connect automatically
channels.qrStep2: Scan the QR code below to authorize
channels.qrStep3: Credentials will be auto-filled after scanning
channels.weixinQrStep2: Scan the QR code below to authorize
channels.weixinQrStep3: Credentials will be auto-filled after scanning
channels.weixinConnectingDesc: Configuration saved, waiting for channel to come online
channels.qrTimeout: Scan timed out (3 min), please retry
channels.qrGenerateFailed: Failed to generate QR code, check network and retry
channels.feishuApiTimeout: Feishu API timed out, please use manual configuration
channels.feishuQrStep1: Open Feishu App, tap "+ → Scan" in top-right
channels.feishuQrStep2: Scan the QR code below to login to Feishu Open Platform
channels.feishuQrScanHint: Use the built-in Scanner in Feishu App to scan
channels.yuanbaoQrStep2: Scan the QR code below to bind your bot
channels.allowFromTip: Only effective when DM Policy is set to Allowlist
channels.allowFromPlaceholder: Enter user ID and press Enter
channels.botNameTip: When set, @BotName mentions will be stripped from group messages
channels.noAgentSelected: Select or create an agent first to manage its channels
channels.emptyHint: No channels yet. Click the top right to create one.
channels.probeNeedConfig: Fill in connection settings before probing

tokenUsage.title: Token Usage Analytics
tokenUsage.description: Analyze token consumption trends across channels and sessions
tokenUsage.dailyTrendDesc: Daily input and output token changes
tokenUsage.weeklyTrendDesc: Weekly aggregated input and output token usage
tokenUsage.channelDetailDesc: Session count and token usage breakdown by channel
tokenUsage.callDetailDesc: Token consumption breakdown for each model call
tokenUsage.callTableDesc: Input, output, and total consumption for each model call
tokenUsage.turnTableDesc: Input, output and total consumption aggregated per round
tokenUsage.question: Question

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: View and manage active chat sessions
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
sessions.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete selected {{count}} sessions?

environments.title: Environment Variables
environments.description: Configure key-value environment variables for agents and skills.

voice.tencentHint: Create SecretId / SecretKey in Tencent Cloud console. ASR and TTS include free trial quota.
voice.openaiHint: Uses OpenAI Whisper for STT and OpenAI TTS for read-aloud.
voice.sttFallback: Server STT failed — switched to browser recognition
voice.nothingToRead: No readable prose in this message (code blocks are skipped)
voice.browserNoChineseVoice: Chrome has no Chinese voice — using Edge TTS instead
voice.ttsFallback: Server TTS failed — switched to browser speech
voice.micNotAvailable: Audio recording unavailable — please use HTTPS
voice.sttNotAvailable: Voice input not available on this device (HTTPS required)
voice.ttsAutoplayBlocked: Autoplay blocked by browser — tap read-aloud again

security.intro: Configure runtime security policies for agents. Running agents reload automatically after save.
security.hitlHint: Listed tools pause before execution until approved or rejected in chat.
security.hitlEnableWarning: Enabling tool approval will pause the agent whenever a listed tool is about to run, requiring manual confirmation. This may add friction: in IM channels you must send /approve or /reject to continue; in the Dashboard an approval card will appear. Make sure you are comfortable with these extra steps.
security.fsPaths: Sensitive paths (one per line, glob supported)
security.fsHint: Matched paths are denied for read/write filesystem tools.
security.piiEnable: Redact API keys in prompts and outputs
security.skillScanHint: Static scan before skill install (wired in a follow-up).
security.toolGuardHint: Regex-scan bash/execute command arguments before execution. Block stops the tool; Require approval pauses for human review on Dashboard or IM (/approve, /reject).
security.toolGuardRulesMaintain: Rules file: {{path}}. Edit the YAML below and save, or edit that file on disk and restart. Running agents reload automatically after save.
security.toolGuardResetConfirm: Restore shipped default rules? Your edits will be lost.
security.toolGuardLoadError: Failed to load command guard rules
security.runtimeHint: Tool approval uses deepagents HITL; command guard blocks risky shell parameters before tools run; ACP external runner permissions keep the existing flow.

observability.langfuseDesc: Send conversation traces to Langfuse for monitoring, debugging, and cost analysis.
observability.hint: After saving, each chat turn (dashboard and IM channels) is exported as a trace with input, output, and token usage.
observability.secretKeySet: A secret key is already saved. Leave blank to keep it.

tls.title: HTTPS (Let's Encrypt)
tls.subtitle: Issue a free TLS certificate when this server listens on 0.0.0.0:80. After issuance, Octop runs HTTPS on 443 and keeps HTTP on 80 for ACME renewals.
tls.stagingHint: Use Let's Encrypt staging (untrusted certificate, for testing)
tls.notEligible: Set bind_host to 0.0.0.0 and port to 80 in config.json, then restart before first issuance.
tls.restartRequired: Certificate installed. Restart Octop to enable HTTPS on 443 (HTTP 80 stays open for renewals).
tls.restartRequiredHint: Click the button below to confirm and restart. The page will refresh automatically when the service is back online.
tls.activeCert: TLS active on 443 — HTTP {{httpPort}} kept for renewals — expires {{expires}}
tls.dualPortActive: Dual listeners: HTTP {{httpPort}} (ACME + redirect) and HTTPS {{httpsPort}}.

models.providersDescription: Configure API keys and endpoints for each provider.
models.llmDescription: The system intelligently selects the best model based on message content. You can also set a preferred model.
models.leaveBlankKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
models.pleaseEnterBaseURL: Please enter the API base URL
models.authHeaderExtra: Inject Authorization: Bearer <api_key> as an extra default header
models.thinkingExtra: Enable extended thinking (chain-of-thought) for reasoning models. When off, thinking is disabled for all models under this provider.
models.headersFormatHint: One header per line, format: Key: Value
models.apiProtocolExtra: Select the protocol compatible with the target API
models.revokeConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to remove the API key for {{name}}? The current LLM model configuration will also be cleared.
models.revokeConfirmSimple: Are you sure you want to remove the API key for {{name}}?
models.enterModelName: Enter model name, e.g. llama3, qwen2.5
models.noCustomProvidersHint: No custom providers yet. Click "Add provider" above to create one.
models.providerIdHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, underscores. Cannot be changed later.
models.createProviderApiKeyPlaceholder: Enter API key (optional, can be set later)
models.initialModelsHint: Optional, can also be added later in settings
models.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete custom provider "{{name}}" and all its models? This cannot be undone.
models.ollamaUnavailable: Ollama is not installed or not running. Please install Ollama and start the daemon.
models.localDeleteConfirm: Delete model "{{name}}"? The model will be removed.
models.localDownloading: Downloading {{repo}}... This may take a few minutes.
models.templateApplied: ✓ Pre-filled from built-in template. You can edit these values.
models.autoRouteTooltip: The system automatically selects the best model based on message modality (image/audio), task complexity, and context length
models.autoRouteDesc: All models below are available for auto-routing. The system intelligently selects the optimal model for each message. ⭐ marks the preferred model, which is prioritized when there are no special requirements.
models.noModelsAvailable: No models available. Please authorize at least one provider and configure models.
models.noEnabledModel: No enabled model available for testing
models.pageSubtitle: Manage LLM providers: configure API Key, Base URL, default model, and verify connectivity via "Test".
models.noProvidersHint: No providers yet. Click the top right to create one.
models.baseUrlExtra: OpenAI-compatible endpoint base URL. Leave blank to use the official default.
models.notePlaceholder: Custom description, only visible in the dashboard
models.apiKeyExtraConfigured: API Key configured. Leave blank to keep current value.
models.apiKeyExtraOptional: Optional — supports self-hosted services without an API key.
models.apiKeyPlaceholderKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
models.testPingHint: Send a single ping using the saved configuration.
models.testDraftNeedModel: Add or select at least one model before testing.
models.codexOAuthHint: Use ChatGPT subscription OAuth instead of an API key. An openai-codex provider is created automatically after login.
models.codexOAuthSuccess: ChatGPT login succeeded; the model provider is configured.
models.codexOAuthDisclaimer: This uses the ChatGPT Codex internal API, not the official api.openai.com API key flow. Review OpenAI terms and stability risks before use.
models.cannotDeleteSharedDesc: This provider is maintained by an administrator (user_id is empty); only administrators can delete it.
models.deleteProviderConfirmSimple: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
models.revokeConfirmContentSimple: Are you sure you want to clear {{name}}'s API Key? Once cleared, this provider will become unauthorized.
models.presetProvidersDesc: Select a provider and enter your API Key to get started
models.presetNameExists: A provider with this name already exists, please edit it directly

advancedSettings.description: Manage runtime configuration and environment variables.

search.desc: Configure AI-powered web search providers to enable your assistant to search the internet. Each provider requires an API key from the respective service.
search.tip: You can configure or modify search providers here. Changes take effect immediately on the next chat session.

update.title: Version & Updates
update.description: Check for the latest release and upgrade Octop with one click.
update.alreadyLatest: You are on the latest version.
update.restartHint: Please restart Octop for the update to take effect.
update.editableHint: Development install detected. Use git pull to update.
update.networkError: Could not reach update server. Check your network.
update.manualUpgradeHint: You can also run: octop update --verbose
update.restartingHint: This typically takes 1-2 minutes. Please wait.
update.restartConfirmContent: Restarting the service will temporarily interrupt all active conversations and tasks. It usually takes 1-2 minutes to come back online. Are you sure?
update.restartReadyHint: Service is back online. Refreshing shortly.
update.restartTimeout: Restart timed out. Run manually: octop restart
update.restartFailed: Restart request failed. Check the service and try again.

agentConfig.title: Configuration
agentConfig.maxItersTooltip: Maximum number of reasoning-acting iterations for ReAct agent
agentConfig.maxItersMin: Max iterations must be at least 1
agentConfig.maxInputLengthTooltip: Maximum input length (tokens) for the model context window
agentConfig.maxInputLengthMin: Max input length must be at least 1000

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat
heartbeat.description: Configure the agent's periodic self-check heartbeat. The heartbeat automatically runs tasks defined in HEARTBEAT.md at the specified interval.
heartbeat.enabledTooltip: When enabled, the agent will periodically execute heartbeat tasks at the specified interval
heartbeat.everyTooltip: Heartbeat execution interval. Supported formats: 30m (30 minutes), 1h (1 hour), 2h30m (2 hours 30 minutes)
heartbeat.targetTooltip: Where heartbeat results are sent: main (main session) or last (most recent channel interaction)
heartbeat.activeHoursEnabledTooltip: When enabled, heartbeat only runs during specified hours to avoid disturbances
heartbeat.taskDescription: Edit HEARTBEAT.md to define the task list the agent executes on each heartbeat — email checks, schedule reminders, and more.
heartbeat.clickToEditTask: Click here to enter edit mode
heartbeat.noAgentSelected: Pick an agent in the top switcher first

proactiveConfig.title: Proactive Reminders
proactiveConfig.description: Let AI periodically review your memories and reach out at the right moment — like a thoughtful assistant who always has your back.
proactiveConfig.enabledTip: When enabled, AI will regularly review your stored memories and proactively message you whenever it thinks something is worth bringing up.
proactiveConfig.everyTip: How often AI reviews your memories to see if there's anything worth reminding you about. Format: 30m, 1h, 2h30m
proactiveConfig.everyInvalid: Invalid format. Use something like 30m, 1h, or 2h30m
proactiveConfig.targetTip: Which conversation window AI should send proactive messages to
proactiveConfig.targetRequired: Please choose where to send messages
proactiveConfig.cooldownHoursTip: How long to wait before reminding you about the same topic again, so AI doesn't keep repeating itself.
proactiveConfig.cooldownHoursMin: Cooldown must be at least 1 hour
proactiveConfig.quietHoursEnabledTip: When enabled, AI won't send any proactive messages during your specified quiet hours.
proactiveConfig.saveFailed: Failed to save proactive reminder settings
proactiveConfig.loadFailed: Failed to load proactive reminder settings

chatWelcome.greeting: Hi! Your personal AI sidekick is here
chatWelcome.descriptionWithAgentSuffix: — share what's on your mind, work or life
chatWelcome.description: Work or life — just tell me what you need, I'll handle it
chatWelcome.inputPlaceholder: Say something to your AI Assistant...
chatWelcome.quickPrompt1Desc: Paste an article or report to extract key points
chatWelcome.quickPrompt1Text: Please summarize the following content and extract the key points and conclusions:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt2Desc: Tell me the recipient and purpose, I'll draft it
chatWelcome.quickPrompt2Text: Please write an email. Recipient: , Purpose: , Tone: formal/friendly.
chatWelcome.quickPrompt3Desc: Paste a code snippet and I'll explain it line by line
chatWelcome.quickPrompt3Text:
Please explain the logic and functionality of the following code step by step:

```

```
chatWelcome.quickPrompt4Desc: Describe your goal and I'll break it into actionable tasks
chatWelcome.quickPrompt4Text: Please create a detailed action plan for the following goal:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt5Desc: Translate Chinese ↔ English or rewrite for clarity
chatWelcome.quickPrompt5Text: Please translate the following into English and ensure it reads naturally:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt6Desc: Give me a topic and I'll generate creative ideas
chatWelcome.quickPrompt6Text: Please brainstorm 5–8 creative directions or ideas around the following topic:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt7Desc: Describe what to write or paste text to polish
chatWelcome.quickPrompt7Text: Please help me write or improve the following content:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt8Desc: Ask a question and I'll provide a thorough answer
chatWelcome.quickPrompt8Text: Please research the following topic and give me a comprehensive overview:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt9Desc: Have a question? Just ask me anything
chatWelcome.quickPrompt9Text: I have a question for you:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt10Desc: Paste a table or dataset to find patterns and trends
chatWelcome.quickPrompt10Text: Please analyze the following data, identify key patterns, trends, or anomalies, and summarize your findings:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt11Desc: Give me a topic and I'll plan your presentation structure
chatWelcome.quickPrompt11Text: Please create a detailed outline for a PowerPoint presentation on the topic:
chatWelcome.quickPrompt12Desc: Paste your resume and I'll strengthen it and highlight key wins
chatWelcome.quickPrompt12Text: Please improve the following resume to make it more professional and impactful, and highlight the key strengths:

modelConfig.promptMessage: Chat requires an LLM model to function. Without a configured model, conversations and messages cannot be sent to the backend for processing and storage, and will be lost after a page refresh. Would you like to configure a model now?
modelConfig.chatDisabledMessage: Chat functionality is disabled because no model is configured. Please configure a model to enable chat.
modelConfig.modelNotConfigured: Please configure a model in Settings before using chat

header.currentVersionAdmin: Current version v{{version}}. Click to open Updates.
header.versionUpdateAvailable: v{{current}} installed — v{{latest}} is available. Click to open Updates.
header.betaTooltip: This version is in internal beta

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the console.

theme.title: Appearance Theme
theme.description: Choose your preferred interface style. Changes take effect immediately.

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
auth.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password, please check your current password
auth.disableFailed: Failed to disable, please check your password

user.title: User Settings
user.description: Manage password protection and display preferences.
user.passwordProtectionDesc: Require a password to access the console.
user.setPasswordHint: Set a password to enable protection.
user.disableProtectionDesc: Enter your current password to confirm disabling protection. After this, anyone can access the console without a password.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: View and manage agent conversation history and daily logs.
memory.conversationHistoryDesc: Browse full conversation history by thread.
memory.conversationDeleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
memory.selectThread: Select a thread to view messages
memory.longTermMemoryDesc: Core knowledge, lessons learned, and important configurations accumulated by the agent.
memory.dailyMemoryDesc: Work logs and interaction summaries automatically recorded by the agent each day.
memory.vectorSearchDesc: Enable semantic understanding for memory retrieval, finding more relevant results.
memory.selectMemory: Select a memory file to view
memory.clickToEditContent: Click here to enter edit mode
memory.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the memory file "{{filename}}"? This cannot be undone.
memory.noAgentSelected: Pick an agent in the top switcher first

vs.title: Semantic Search
vs.description: When enabled, memory search understands meaning (not just keywords), helping the AI find more relevant memories.
vs.disableVectorConfirmDesc: Only keyword search will be used. Your memory files and local vector index data are not deleted; you can turn embedding back on later.
vs.modeLocalDesc: Run AI locally to understand semantics — no internet required, model download needed on first use
vs.modeCustomDesc: Connect to an external embedding service (e.g., OpenAI Embeddings)
vs.modelNameHint: Presets are fastembed ONNX models; for a larger Chinese model try jinaai/jina-embeddings-v2-base-zh
vs.notDownloadedHint: Please download the model first. Semantic search will be enabled automatically after download.
vs.loadStarted: Loading the local model. Please wait...
vs.loadComplete: Local model loaded — semantic search is now enabled
vs.downloadComplete: Search model ready — semantic search is now enabled
vs.downloadStarted: Downloading search model in background, please keep this page open...
vs.vectorIndexWarning: If you change the embedding model, switch between local and external providers, or edit vector dimensions, a mismatch with the existing memory index will cause the Qdrant collection to be recreated — stored vectors are cleared and the index is rebuilt from your memory files.

personalization.title: Scenarios
personalization.description: Customize the agent's behavior, identity, and interaction style.

cards.identityDesc: Who the agent is — name, creature, vibe, emoji, and avatar. Fill this in to give the agent a face and a self.
cards.soulDesc: Define the agent's core behavioral principles, communication style, and personality boundaries.
cards.profileDesc: What the agent knows about you — your name, preferences, timezone, and personal info.
cards.agentsDesc: The agent's behavioral guide — memory strategies, security rules, and operational protocols.
cards.toolsDesc: Available tools and skills for the agent — define capability scope, call permissions, and usage restrictions.
cards.bootstrapDesc: First-launch self-awareness process that helps the agent establish its identity.
cards.heartbeatDesc: Periodic self-check task list — email checks, schedule reminders, and recurring behaviors.

personalization.clickToEditContent: Click here to enter edit mode

mbti.sceneDesc: Give your agent a unique soul — pick an MBTI personality type or take a 3-minute quiz. It shapes how your agent talks, thinks, and feels.
mbti.title: MBTI Personality
mbti.subtitle: Pick an MBTI type or take a 3-minute test to unlock a unique personality!
mbti.applySuccess: {{code}} personality injected! Your agent has a character now ✨
mbti.testIntro: Just 28 quick either-or questions — takes about 3 minutes. Don't overthink it, go with your gut!
mbti.disclaimer: This is a fun, quick personality quiz for entertainment only. It has no clinical or psychological diagnostic significance.

scenes.title: Scene Install
scenes.description: Pre-built workspace content packs. One-click install to equip the agent with domain-specific capabilities. Importing creates the corresponding configuration files and skills in the workspace.
scenes.shortVideoDesc: All-in-one short video content assistant — from topic selection, scripts, storyboards to publish copy, covering Douyin, Kuaishou, Xiaohongshu, and more.
scenes.creativeDevDesc: Full-stack creative development assistant — blending creative thinking with technical implementation, specializing in H5 experiences, data visualization, AI generation, and brand concepts.
scenes.newsTrendDesc: Real-time news analyst — continuously tracking multi-source news hotspots, generating daily briefings, and providing trend insights with in-depth analysis.
scenes.wechatOpsDesc: WeChat content operations expert — from topic planning, headline optimization, content creation to data review, helping you build a high-quality content matrix.
scenes.installConfirmContent: This will import the "{{name}}" scene pack into the workspace. Files with the same name (e.g., SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md) will be overwritten. Continue?
scenes.readOnlyHint: Read-only — This is preset content. After applying, you can edit it in "Current Scene".

terminal.title: Terminal AI+
terminal.description: Run an interactive shell terminal in the browser

ai.noTerminal: Please open a terminal session first
ai.gateDesc: The AI terminal needs an ops engineer agent to generate accurate commands
ai.gateNoProvider: Ops engineer has no model configured
ai.autopilotGoalPlaceholder: Describe what you want to accomplish, e.g.: package the project as a Docker image...
ai.autopilotTimeout: Command may still be running — timed out and continued

remoteBrowser.title: Browser AI+
remoteBrowser.description: View and control the remote server's browser in real-time
remoteBrowser.emptyHint: Click Launch Browser, then enter a URL to view and control the remote browser
remoteBrowser.idleHint: Watch Agent browse in real time, or launch to pre-login sites and manage bookmarks. Your login sessions persist after closing this page — Agent can reuse them.
remoteBrowser.checkInstallTip: Check if Playwright browser is installed; install if missing
remoteBrowser.installSuccessHint: Browser is ready — you can start a session
remoteBrowser.installFailedHint: Retry or run playwright install chromium manually
remoteBrowser.notInstalledHint: Run the auto-installer below or manually run playwright install chromium.
remoteBrowser.playwrightMissing: The playwright package is missing. Install octop[browser] extras first.
remoteBrowser.sharedSessionHint: Shares the same browser session as Agent in chat
remoteBrowser.bookmarkLimit: You can save up to 12 bookmarks

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.noAgentDesc: The browser-side assistant reuses the active Agent's chat capability.
ai.noBrowserDesc: Click the button below to start the browser and interact with the AI assistant.
ai.placeholderWithSkills: Type skill to replay, or chat
ai.inputPlaceholder: Ask about page or control browser...

browserWorkspace.title: Browser
browserWorkspace.awaitingUserAuth: Please sign in — complete login in the browser view
browserWorkspace.connectFailed: Failed to connect to browser stream
browserWorkspace.firstConnectHint: First connection may take a few seconds
browserWorkspace.waitingAgentHint: Waiting for Agent to launch the browser…
browserWorkspace.interactiveHint: 🖱️ Click, scroll, and type directly on the browser view
browserWorkspace.emptyFooterHint: Agent will use the browser automatically when needed
browserWorkspace.browserStatusIdle: Browser (click to view or take over)

embedding.title: Local Embedding Configuration
embedding.description: Configure vector models for text vectorization and similarity retrieval.
embedding.disableVectorConfirmDesc: Only keyword search will be used. Your memory files and local vector index data are not deleted; you can turn embedding back on later.
embedding.modeLocalDesc: Use local model for vectorization (requires model download)
embedding.modelNameHint: Must be a fastembed-supported id (e.g. BAAI/bge-small-zh-v1.5); bge-base/large-zh are not bundled in fastembed
embedding.loadStarted: Loading the local model. Please wait...
embedding.downloadStarted: Model download started. Please keep this page open...
embedding.vectorIndexWarning: If you change the embedding model, switch between local and external providers, or edit vector dimensions, a mismatch with the existing memory index will cause the Qdrant collection to be recreated — stored vectors are cleared and the index is rebuilt from your memory files.

cos.emptyGuideTitle: Please configure Tencent Cloud credentials first
cos.emptyGuideHint: Set TENCENT_CLOUD_SECRET_ID and TENCENT_CLOUD_SECRET_KEY in environment variables

sharedModels.deleteConfirm: Delete shared provider "{{name}}"? All users will lose access to this provider.

wizard.title: Initial setup
wizard.sessionExpired: Wizard session expired. Please verify the bootstrap password again.

password.label: Bootstrap password
password.hint: On first start, Octop prints a one-time bootstrap password in the server terminal and writes it to the file below.
password.wherePath: On the server, open {{path}} or check the yellow banner printed when Octop starts.
password.whereDefault: On the server, open ~/.octop/octop-login.txt or check the yellow banner printed when Octop starts.
password.missingFile: Bootstrap password file not found. Restart the server with no users to regenerate it.
password.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

model.intro: Configure one model provider so the assistant can reply. You can skip this step and configure it later.
model.choosePresetHint: Click a card to pre-fill settings — you only need to enter your API key
model.testFirstHint: Run “Test connection” and wait for success before continuing.
model.modelsHint: Select the models to enable. You can also type a custom model ID below.
model.hintReasoning: Reasoning model for complex analysis and planning
model.hintMultimodal: Supports image and other multimodal inputs
model.formIncomplete: Complete the required fields before testing connectivity

finish.loginFailed: Auto-login failed. Please log in manually.
finish.providerFailed: Could not save the provider just now. Open the Models page after login to retry.

storage.pageSubtitle: Manage storage backends (COS, S3, OSS, etc.) for use by agents
storage.emptyMyStorageHint: Go to "Supported Types" to pick and configure a backend for your agents
storage.noBackends: No storage backends yet. Click the button above to add one.
storage.descCos: Tencent Cloud Object Storage — ideal for China deployments, supports CDN acceleration
storage.descS3: Amazon S3, the industry-standard object storage; compatible with most cloud providers
storage.descOss: Alibaba Cloud OSS — best for Alibaba Cloud ecosystem applications
storage.descObs: Huawei Cloud OBS — best for Huawei Cloud ecosystem
storage.descFilesystem: Mount a local host directory — ideal for development and single-machine deployments
storage.descShell: Execute commands in a local shell with timeout and environment isolation
storage.descPostgres: Use PostgreSQL tables as a structured storage backend with schema isolation
storage.descDocker: Run code inside Docker containers for a secure, sandboxed execution environment
storage.descCustom: Any S3-compatible service (MinIO, Ceph, Cloudflare R2, etc.)
storage.browseEmpty: Directory is empty or cannot be listed

acp.description: Connect external ACP-compatible coding agents. Runner settings are shared across all your agents; enable the acp_runner tool per agent below.
acp.globalRunnersHint: Runner configuration below applies to all agents for your account.
acp.toolEnabledHint: The acp_runner tool is enabled per agent — switch the agent above to configure the current one.
acp.intro_opencode: Open-source AI coding agent; connect via stdio ACP.
acp.intro_codebuddy: Tencent Cloud CodeBuddy Code — start with codebuddy --acp.
acp.intro_claude_code: Anthropic Claude Code terminal coding assistant.
acp.intro_codex: OpenAI Codex CLI with ACP protocol support.
acp.clickCardToConfigure: Click the card to set the launch command first
acp.runnerKeyInvalid: Use letters, numbers, underscore or hyphen only
acp.deleteConfirm: This custom runner will be removed.
acp.docsHint: Install an ACP-compatible agent locally (opencode, codebuddy --acp, etc.) before enabling a runner.

plugins.installUrlHint: Enter a ZIP download URL (all agents reload after install).
plugins.adminHint: Plugins live under ~/.octop/plugins/ on the server. After installing tool plugins, open the Tool management tab, pick an agent in the sidebar, and enable tools.
plugins.agentHint: Enable plugin tools so the agent can call them in chat. Configure API keys first when required.
plugins.noAgent: Select an agent in the sidebar first
plugins.noTools: No plugin tools available. Ask an admin to install tool plugins in Tool management.
